title: The Loud Notification
content: During an important meeting, a loud notification suddenly came from my phone. The sound surprised everyone in the room. I quickly apologized and silenced the device. Earlier that morning, I had forgotten to enable silent mode. After the meeting, I changed my notification settings to prevent similar interruptions. Technology is useful, but unexpected alerts can be distracting at the wrong moment. Since that day, I always check my phone settings before meetings, classes, or other situations where silence is important.
